name: Dawning Information Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Dawning Information Industry Co., Ltd. provides high-performance computing, server, storage, cloud computing, and big data products in China and internationally. It offers rack, storage, and blade servers, as well as high-density servers; workstation products; disk array and cloud storage products; server cabinets and cooling solutions; high-performance computers; and cloud computing products. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Beijing, China. Dawning Information Industry Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Landsea Green Group Co., Ltd.
